message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #000000
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #000000
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  ActorBorderColor #000000
  ActorBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  DatabaseBorderColor #000000
  DatabaseBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  ArrowColor #000000
  MessageAlign left
}

actor User as U
participant WebApp as W
database DB as D

U -> W : [POST] / driver {body}
W -> D : save driver
D --> W : OK
W --> U : 201 CREATED {body}

U -> W : [GET] / driver
W -> D : get driver
D --> W : driver object
W --> U : 200 OK {body}
@enduml
